readme.text: You can find the documentation and how to setup RouletteRD right here.

general.enableroulette:
Enable Roulette
When checked, RouletteRD will appear on the screen.
general.title: Setup
general.testingmode:
Testing Mode
The Roulette will be populated with fake users
for testing purposes and it won't accept entries.
general.label: Label
general.prize:
Prize
Tell the users what's the prize is gonna be.
general.positions:
Roulette Position
Sets the vertical position of the Roulette.
general.speed:
Speed
Sets how fast the wheel will spin.
general.duration:
Duration
Sets how long the wheel will spin.
general.command:
Join Command
Command used to join the Roulette.
general.runaction:
Run Action on Result
Runs the Streamer.bot action selected below when the winner is picked.
general.winner_message: THE RESULTS ARE IN!🔥 The winner is

tiktok.title:
TikTok
TikTok chat can participate.
tiktok.warning: To announce the winner over TikTok chat, you need to follow these instructions.
